sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96235" key="stalte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σταλ-τέον</orth>, <sense id="n96235.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must check</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0057.tlg004:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
